description: As a risk analyst, develop an interpretable Random Forest model for credit risk assessment using the dataset at '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/german_credit.csv' where 'default' is the target variable. Your analysis should include a 70/30 train-test split (using set.seed(123)), performance evaluation (Accuracy and AUC), and model interpretation through variable importance and partial dependence. Save the performance metrics to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/model_metrics.csv', a plot of the top 10 predictors to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/variable_importance.png', and a partial dependence plot for 'months_loan_duration' to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/pdp_duration.png'. All code must be written in '/home/ga/RProjects/credit_risk_analysis.R'.
